Data Inaccuracy Screens glucose traces for sustained lows, flat curves, and jump-point patterns. Curve rule screening Fingerstick if no pattern Service card gate
Sensor falling off Checks detachment claims against wear time, telemetry gaps, and device status. Abnormal status only Telemetry gap review Fall-out warranty rule
Abnormal After Warm-up Reviews initialization failures, probe errors, recovery timing, and abnormal status. Init / in-use / probe 3h recheck window Subtype warranty rule
Application failure Routes insertion, site, adhesive, and bleeding evidence into photo-backed review. Min. 2 site photos VLM material scoring Insertion evidence
Screens glucose traces for sustained lows, flat curves, and jump-point patterns.

Reviews initialization failures, probe errors, recovery timing, and abnormal status.
Routes insertion, site, adhesive, and bleeding evidence into photo-backed review.

Min. 2 site photos VLM material scoring Insertion evidence
Init / in-use / probe 3h recheck window Subtype warranty rule

SI SIBIONICS CGM AI SERVDESK Device Detect Thresholds Detect record ? ☰ 0 CH christest@sibionics.com
We will first run the first round of curve screening, and then decide whether to require blood glucose data comparison screenshots.
Persistent low, no fluctuation, and jump-point checks run first.
Data Deviation cases must collect two paired CGM/BGM image groups before review.
Only be required to provide two sets of comparison screenshots if none of these three data anomalies are detected.
